programme.title: Love Sex Aur Dhoka
programme.desc: An Indian anthology film that tells three separate but interconnected stories revolving around the themes of love, sex, and betrayal. The film is shot in a found-footage style, utilizing surveillance cameras, mobile phones, and webcams to capture the stories of individuals from different backgrounds, whose lives are intertwined in unexpected ways. It explores the dark side of relationships and the impact of technology on modern romance.

programme.desc: A complete video retrospective of George's 80s hits - both solo & with Wham, Elton John, Aretha Franklin & that forgotten top 10 from Boogie Box High.

programme.title: Beat The January Blues!

programme.title: Make Mine A Double with Pat Sharp!
programme.desc: They says 2 heads are better than one & in the 80s the charts were full of collaborations. So pour a large one & have double the fun with Pat Sharp's top 40 duets.

programme.title: 30 Years of Rock No.1s: 1985-2015
programme.desc: In order - 30 years, every song a number 1 rock single or from a classic number 1 rock album.

programme.title: Sunday Rock Classics
programme.desc: Rounding off the week with rock classics and anthems! We guarantee AC/DC, Nirvana, Queen, Meat Loaf, Bon Jovi & much more!

programme.title: The Rock 100 of the 80s
programme.desc: Mark Goodier brings you our exclusive chart of the 100 biggest rock songs of the 80s, based on streaming data, historic sales info, and enduring global appeal. Crank this up LOUD!

programme.title: Stupidly Love
programme.desc: Even the imperfect moments are just part of true feelings. Dive into these lovable songs that capture the fluttering, stumbling heart of falling in love!

programme.title: Fragments of Blue
programme.desc: Enjoy the freedom of this moment with pleasant melodies and refreshing beats cutting through the clear air.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' The 1st Mini Album
programme.desc: Track List: FOCUS, Pretty Please, STYLE

programme.title: SM Female Solo Artists Live Clip Collection
programme.desc: Experience intimate live performances from SM's solo artists including BoA, TAEYEON, IRENE, WENDY, and JOY. This collection showcases their authentic vocals and heartfelt performances captured in studio live clips.

programme.title: JAEHYUN The 1st Album 「J」
programme.desc: 6. Easy With his smooth and gentle voice, Jaehyun brings a unique color to NCT's music. 「J」 is his very first solo album, where he took part in writing, composing, and shaping the overall direction, including the album title. Just as he often marks his belongings with the initial “J,” this album also reflects what is most true to him, which is why he named it 「J」. 1. Smoke 5. Completely [Track List] 7. Can't Get You 8. Smoke (English Ver.)4. Dandelion 2. Roses 3. Flamin' Hot Lemon

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.” “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.

programme.title: YOONA 'Wish to Wish' MV
programme.desc: 'Wish to Wish' is a medium-tempo pop song that reinterprets the mood of 1980s pop. The harmonious blend of YOONA's soft, calm vocal tone and its lively orchestral arrangement leaves a strong impression. The lyrics written by YOONA herself convey the heartfelt message of “let's continue to shine together for a long time,” giving the song an even more special meaning.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire. In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: EXO has returned with a new trailer. At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: A Truth Born of Fragility
programme.desc: A whirlwind of sincerity that an indifferent voice cannot hide. Listen to the most honest confessions delivered by a fragile heart. Between collapsing boundaries and bursting revelations, you will encounter the moment when suppressed emotions finally find their truth.

programme.title: Blurry Moment
programme.desc: A moment when all noise fades and your vision blurs. Submerge yourself in surreal landscapes and calm beats. A mood filled only with your own breath, as light as a state of zero gravity.

programme.title: A Warmth That Melts Your Heart
programme.desc: Take a moment to breathe and fill your heart with the warm, comforting voices of Girls' Generation that gently embrace your weary days.

programme.desc: Scenes from somewhere between vivid reality and hazy imagination, envisioned amidst a monotonous routine. Stay within the flow of these diverse sequences and beats.

programme.title: Find me in Memory
programme.desc: A love story between a man who remembers every second of his life and a woman who forgot her painful past.

programme.title: Find me in Memory
programme.desc: A love story between a man who remembers every second of his life and a woman who forgot her painful past.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Varanasi
programme.desc: This film documents the spirit of Varanasi in all its glory. It elucidates more about the mythological significance of the city, its place in the pages of history, its cultural heritage and the lifestyle of the locals living there. It also explains the value the city holds in the eyes and hearts of the tourists thronging the city.

programme.title: Smile Pinki
programme.desc: An Oscarwinning documentary about children born with cleft palates in India, and the people working hard to help them. Pinki is a fiveyearold girl with a cleft lip, born into a desperately poor family from a village in the Mirzapur District in India. Pinkis parents did not know that her condition could be fixed with one simple operation until they met Pankaj, a social worker travelling through rural India, gathering patients to go to a hospital in Varanasi that provides free surgery to thousands every year. This reallife fairy tale follows Pinkis journey from a life of isolation and ostracism to a smile of joy.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Epic Ke Dus is a halfhour collated list of the top ten people, places or events of a chosen topic, examples of which include rivalries, thinkers and warriors. Each topic has been thoroughly researched and a panel of experts on the subject has carefully selected the stories that are fitting to be part of the topic. This panel is seen on the episodes giving their views on the events, the significance of the event and describing the mood of the era, publics reaction to these events and how it contributed to change the course of Indian history.

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: Wild Ones draws inspiration from the rhythms of nature, delving into the wonders of the animal kingdom. This captivating series explores the diverse behaviors that define survival—hunting and feeding strategies, family bonds, defense tactics, and the intricacies of courtship and mating. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: PREHISTORIC TREASURE FOUND?!
programme.desc: A surprising discovery leads Coyote on an adventure uncovering prehistoric relics. The episode mixes paleontology, exploration, and thrilling insights into ancient life.

programme.title: Lake Erie Monster – Is It Real?!
programme.desc: Is the Lake Erie Monster real? Coyote dives into folklore, interviews, and lake searches to investigate the mystery behind the legend.Chiggers are tiny but brutal. Coyote takes one for the team to show what their bites look like and how to avoid the fiery aftermath.

programme.title: Step Inside a Volcano!
programme.desc: Mark steps into an actual volcano! With heat, gases, and lava rock all around, this geology-heavy episode explores Earth's fiery power firsthand.The giant catfish is a powerhouse predator. Coyote takes a bite and breaks down how these fish use their strength to dominate waterways.

programme.title: My Precious! – Coyote Goes Full Gollum!
programme.desc: Channeling his inner Gollum, Coyote becomes obsessed with a strange find in the wild. This lighthearted episode brings out his wildest side.

programme.title: Electric Eel Shocks Me Again... and Again!
programme.desc: Mark returns to the electric eel—and gets shocked again and again. This episode highlights electricity in nature and its incredible uses.500 fire ants. One arm. Coyote takes a sting challenge that pushes the limits of pain while explaining how fire ants swarm and attack.

programme.title: Beaded Lizard vs. Gila Monster!
programme.desc: Beaded lizard vs. Gila monster. Coyote compares these venomous reptiles in a desert showdown, highlighting their bite strength and venom use.One of the world's most dangerous stings comes from the killer bee. Coyote gets stung and breaks down their behavior and threat level.

programme.title: Human Blood vs. Snake Venom!
programme.desc: Coyote tests what happens when human blood encounters snake venom in a controlled, educational experiment. He breaks down the biology, effects, and fascinating science behind venom.

programme.title: Scariest Pig on the Planet! (Bearded Pig of Borneo)
programme.desc: In Borneo, Mark encounters the bearded pig, a wild and intimidating animal with a face only a mother could love—plus tusks to match.Mark tracks down and is stung by a mammoth wasp—a rare species with a sting that ranks high on the pain scale.

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: Bullet Ant Challenge – Will It Sting?!
programme.desc: The ultimate challenge—Coyote revisits the infamous bullet ant to find out if the sting is truly as bad as legends say. Pain scale off the charts.Did Coyote really find a dinosaur? He uncovers a bizarre modern-day creature that looks like it crawled straight out of the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Abandoned Island! – Can We Survive 24 Hours?
programme.desc: Can Coyote and his team survive 24 hours on an abandoned island? With no supplies, the wilderness becomes both home and threat.

programme.title: Sliced by a Spiny Lobster!
programme.desc: The spiny lobster's claws may look small, but one swipe slices skin. Coyote takes a cut and explains this crustacean's anatomy.Tarpon are giant, fast, and aggressive. Coyote gets up close—and briefly inside—during this wild feeding encounter in the water.

programme.title: Stung by the Longest Stinger! (Cow Killer Ant)
programme.desc: The cow killer ant lives up to its name with a stinger that's long, venomous, and brutal. Mark takes it on in a painful sting challenge.The desert scorpion's sting may be quick, but the pain lingers. Mark walks viewers through the anatomy and danger of this desert dweller.

programme.title: Deadly Snake Milking Gone Wrong!
programme.desc: Things go south during a venom extraction. Coyote experiences the dangers firsthand in this episode where snake milking takes a scary turn.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas uncovers the revolutionary spirit woven into the music of St. Croix, where sound has long served as a rallying cry for justice and identity. Through the powerful perspectives of Mada Nile, Ras Attitude, Ras Bach, the Ay-Ay Cultural Dancers, and Kevin Williams, this episode explores how artists have used music to confront oppression, celebrate resilience, and inspire change — from the island's historic struggles to its modern-day movements.

programme.title: COFFEE The Ultimate Language
programme.desc: Rogers, Arkansas, is a vibrant city where rich history, and a thriving arts scene converge. ​In this episode Andrea Allen, US Barista Champion, Visits 2 woman owned shops roasting and serving Rogers in a big way.

programme.title: The Main Event
programme.desc: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of America's oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.

programme.title: Cheat Meal
programme.desc: Tyler and Monica head to Galveston, Texas, to create a fiery feast for Concetta, the spice-obsessed owner of Maceo Spice & Import Co. From the coastal vibes at Vida Agave to island-famous eats at The Spot, savory classics at Mario's Seawall, local favorites at Mosquito Cafe, and indulgent sweets from Pattycakes Bakery, they turn up the heat to craft a cheat meal packed with bold flavors and Galveston flair.

programme.title: Virginia Beach
programme.desc: Jim kicks off his journey in Virginia Beach, a coastal gem with a deep-rooted fishing heritage. But Mother Nature has her own plans—as storm clouds roll in, Jim has a challenge ahead: tagging his first Redfish for NOAA to help track its migration.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners

programme.title: Four Corners

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!
